content:
🚨 Government of India | Ministry of Law & Justice – Legal Consultant Vacancy ⚖️
A valuable opportunity for law graduates, advocates, and legal professionals to contribute to policy-making, legislative work, and legal research at the national level.
If you're looking to build a meaningful legal career while gaining exposure to the functioning of the Government of India, this opportunity deserves your attention.
📌 Key Areas: ✅ Legal Research
✅ Legislative Drafting
✅ Policy Formulation
✅ Governance & Regulatory Work
📖 Interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification regarding eligibility, experience requirements, remuneration, and the application process.
💬 Tag a law student, advocate, or legal professional who should know about this opportunity.

#LegalJobs #LawAndJustice #GovernmentJobs #LegalConsultant #LawGraduates #Advocates #LegalCareer #LegalProfessionals #PublicPolicy #LegislativeDrafting #LegalResearch #CareerOpportunity #LawStudents #JudiciaryAspirants #UGCNETLaw #LawOfficer #LegalUpdates #GovernmentOfIndia #MinistryOfLawAndJustice #ByLaws #LegalEducation #LinkedInLawyers #IndiaJobs #LegalCommunity #CareerGrowth
